info.title: ArcLink Hosted API
info.description: ArcLink self-serve AI deployment platform API.

get.summary: Read public aggregate Academy training telemetry

confirm.description: Must be true after the admin/operator explicitly confirms the modeled action.

get.summary: Read Operator Pod Comms aggregate rows without message narratives

post.summary: Apply Crew Training on a Captain's behalf with admin audit

get.summary: Read operator snapshot (host readiness, diagnostics, journey, evidence)
Read provider/model state plus sanitized Chutes budget, credential-lifecycle, and threshold policy boundary (admin)
Read scale operations snapshot (fleet, placements, action attempts, rollouts)
Read aggregate ArcLink Wrapped status without Captain narrative

post.summary: Login and resolve user or admin role

201.description: User or admin session created with Set-Cookie

post.summary: Open Stripe checkout for onboarding session
Claim user session after paid onboarding

get.summary: Redirect a public bot checkout button to Stripe

post.summary: Adopt a redacted public Academy specialist into the Captain's Crew

200.description: Public specialist adopted as a Captain-owned Trainee

400.description: No ArcPod or specialist is not public/adoptable

post.summary: Rename or retitle a user's Agent
Stage a private-backup deploy key for a user's deployment

200.description: Backup deploy-key public key and fail-closed verification state returned

400.description: Backup key staging is not configured or repo setup is incomplete

post.summary: Record the private-backup GitHub write-check boundary

200.description: Backup verification state returned; unattended local checks fail closed without activation

get.summary: Read user billing and entitlement state

post.summary: Acknowledge credential storage and remove future handoff visibility

get.summary: Read the active and prior Crew Recipe

post.summary: Confirm Crew Training and apply the additive SOUL overlay
Preview or regenerate a Crew Recipe without applying it

get.summary: Read accepted linked resources for the authenticated user
Read provider/model state plus sanitized Chutes budget, credential-lifecycle, and threshold policy boundary (user)
Read user provisioning and deployment status

post.summary: Generate Stripe Checkout link for ArcPod Refueling

200.description: Payment-mode Checkout URL and quote returned

get.summary: Read share approvals and recipient acceptance waits for the authenticated user

post.summary: Accept an approved linked resource share
Request a Drive/Code share grant from a deployment-scoped broker
Claim a share by its ephemeral nonce (/arclink_share_accept)

200.description: Share claimed and materialized as a Linked resource

post.summary: Owner-revoke a minted-but-unclaimed ephemeral share nonce

200.description: Nonce revoked (or already revoked); it can no longer be claimed

post.summary: Retry queueing the current Raven share notification

get.summary: List OpenAI-compatible models allowed for the ArcPod router key

401.description: Missing, invalid, revoked, or suspended router key

503.description: Router database or upstream credential is unavailable

post.summary: Relay OpenAI-compatible chat completions through the ArcLink LLM Router

400.description: Invalid body, unsupported model, or request limit exceeded

401.description: Missing, invalid, revoked, or suspended router key

402.description: Billing, budget, or quota boundary blocks inference

429.description: Per-key, per-deployment, per-Captain, or concurrency limit exceeded

503.description: Router database or central Chutes credential is unavailable

sessionAuth.name: X-ArcLink-Session-Id
sessionAuth.description: Session-based auth via cookies or headers.

routerBearerAuth.description: Per-deployment ArcLink LLM router key. Raw keys are materialized only into ArcPods and are never returned by provider-state APIs.

shareRequestBrokerAuth.name: X-ArcLink-Share-Request-Broker-Token
shareRequestBrokerAuth.description: Deployment-scoped Drive/Code share-request broker token. Token material is stored only in ArcPod runtime secrets; the hosted API stores and verifies only a hash.
